codeReview.summary: The replay-verification changes group original failures by signature, queue up to two replay attempts per candidate, and only promote replay-backed issue clusters when confidence is positive. I did not find a correctness issue in this feature.

summary: Reviewed the handoff, transcript skeleton, and commit `130f6a8b572d52c59f2abfaf076c23c4429f734d` for `replay-verification`. The candidate selection and replay-confidence logic look coherent and I found no code defects in this feature.
